creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 244953
Patch for easyrpg-player

Use upstream release archive as recommended by Porters Handbook and also to avoid breakage due to GitHub's changed policies [1]
Backport upstream commit a4672d2e30db4e4918c8f3580236faed3c9d04c1 to fix build with fmt 10+

1: https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/porters-handbook/book/#makefile-master_sites-github

Compile tested on 13.2-RELEASE (amd64)
Poudriere testport OK 12.4-RELEASE (amd64)
